challenge_text: Alternate state_change run selection might smuggle lookahead if the run's as_of grid is not strictly ≤ signal_available_date under the same governance rules as production.
resolution_notes: Deferred until Phase 38 DB-bound PIT runner proves deterministic boundaries for each alternate spec; no promotion until documented.
phase38_evidence_summary: DB-bound replay preserves join_key_mismatch for fixture under baseline and lag; alternate did not yield joined outcomes for this fixture.

challenge_text: The eight names may be undergoing real strategic or accounting transitions; treating residual join mismatch as a pure timestamp artifact risks understating fundamental state uncertainty.
resolution_notes: Requires cross-family tests (cadence, filing boundary) before treating mismatch as mechanical only.

challenge_text: A single PIT harness with three specs is underpowered for quantifying publication lag vs grid effects; alternate runs may be too correlated to isolate cadence from run-id effects.
resolution_notes: Bind additional spec families (Phase 39 contract) and require row-level comparisons under shared schema.

challenge_text: Fixture analysis is 1y-leaning while sector/cadence mechanisms may operate on 3–5y reporting regimes; promotion or product use without horizon alignment misstates residual severity.
resolution_notes: Defer product-facing claims until horizon-tagged hypothesis families are tested or explicitly scoped.

challenge_text: Run completion anchoring may still be too coarse if intra-day publication matters; grid lag hypothesis needs run timestamps vs score as_of alignment across more than one run.
resolution_notes: Phase 40 family execution batch; queryable with family_id.

challenge_text: Filing-public proxy equals signal_available_date until EDGAR timestamps are wired; do not treat this execution as filing-semantics falsification.
resolution_notes: Phase 40 family execution batch; queryable with family_id.

challenge_text: Registry lag is research-governed but not product-approved; promotion still requires explicit policy signoff beyond JSON registry.
resolution_notes: Phase 40 family execution batch; queryable with family_id.

challenge_text: Stratified fixture replay currently equals production pick on the same rows; sector stratification needs universe slice or metadata before it discriminates mechanisms.
resolution_notes: Phase 40 family execution batch; queryable with family_id.

challenge_text: Phase 41 filing substrate: 8 rows, 8 still on explicit signal_available_date proxy; see bundle filing_substrate.per_row for exact vs filed-date vs unavailable classifications.
resolution_notes: Phase 41 falsifier substrate batch; queryable via phase41_family_id.
